'''zhamana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gradientlessness|gradientlessness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gradientlessness|gradientlessness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhamana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæmænæth|zhæmænæth]] || [[word:zhæmænæj|zhæmænæj]] || [[word:zhæmænæsh|zhæmænæsh]] || [[word:zhæmænæ|zhæmænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhamamanath|zhamamanath]] || [[word:zhamamanaj|zhamamanaj]] || [[word:zhamamanash|zhamamanash]] || [[word:zhamamana|zhamamana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhamanath|zhamanath]] || [[word:zhamanaj|zhamanaj]] || [[word:zhamanash|zhamanash]] || [[word:zhamana|zhamana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhamafnath|zhamafnath]] || [[word:zhamafnaj|zhamafnaj]] || [[word:zhamafnash|zhamafnash]] || [[word:zhamafnaf|zhamafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhamanatha|zhamanatha]] || [[word:zhamanaja|zhamanaja]] || [[word:zhamanasha|zhamanasha]] || [[word:zhamanaka|zhamanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhamanath|zhamanath]] || [[word:zhamanaj|zhamanaj]] || [[word:zhamanash|zhamanash]] || [[word:zhamana|zhamana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhamanathal|zhamanathal]] || [[word:zhamanajal|zhamanajal]] || [[word:zhamanashal|zhamanashal]] || [[word:zhamanakal|zhamanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhamanathatha|zhamanathatha]] || [[word:zhamanajaja|zhamanajaja]] || [[word:zhamanashasha|zhamanashasha]] || [[word:zhamanaka|zhamanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhamanathan|zhamanathan]] || [[word:zhamanajan|zhamanajan]] || [[word:zhamanashan|zhamanashan]] || [[word:zhamanakan|zhamanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhamanathaoro|zhamanathaoro]] || [[word:zhamanajaoro|zhamanajaoro]] || [[word:zhamanashaoro|zhamanashaoro]] || [[word:zhamanakaoro|zhamanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
